title: inga dichotoma
intro: Inga dichotoma, also known as the white inga or Spanish walnut, is a tropical tree native to the Americas, characterized by its broad, rounded crown and edible fruit. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Inga dichotoma include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Inga dichotoma is prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make traditional remedies such as cough syrups, fever reducers, and digestive aids.
